_description: ISA Growth Stock Analysis — Source Performance Log. Read at start of every run to dynamically reorder source waterfalls. Updated at end of every run with observed success rates. Never reset counts — they accumulate across runs to build reliable signal.
_coverage_target: 99% of all constituents screened and scored per run
_waterfall_rule: For each index+metric combination, sort sources by success_rate descending before attempting. Demote sources with success_rate < 0.50. The default waterfall in the Data Sourcing Policy is overridden by observed rates in this file.

sector.note: Gate 1 sector classification; 146 excluded as low-growth sectors (Utilities/Energy/Materials/etc)

gross_margin.note: 452 = gate1 passers; 28 gate_data_unresolved across gates 2-4; EU financial statement coverage lower than US

roic.note: Applies to scored stocks only; EU balance sheet data less consistent than US

forward_pe.note: Lower coverage for Eastern European / smaller exchanges (WSE, CPH, OSL)

target_price.note: Thin analyst coverage for smaller EU names; ~65% of high-score stocks had quoteSummary 404 on overlays

overlay_quotesummary.note: CRITICAL: quoteSummary endpoint returning HTTP 404 for ~65% of European high-score tickers. Affects WACC, est_revisions, val_hist overlays. Known yfinance behaviour on EU exchanges. 122 overlays complete, 5 partial.

sector.note: Constituent feed now sourced via iShares CHSPI CSV (live) — success rate has improved steadily since the May-09 curated-list run.

primary.name: nasdaq_screener_api
primary.notes: Returns all ~4,141 Nasdaq-listed stocks; $2bn market cap filter applied during fetch reduces to ~1,131. First used as fallback on 2026-05-22 run after ONEQ WAF block; now designated primary.

fallback.name: nasdaq_screener_api_no_download_param
fallback.notes: Same endpoint without download=true param — different JSON parse path.

dead_sources.name: ONEQ_fidelity_html
dead_sources.notes: Blocked in bash (HTTP 400/403) AND blocked by Chrome safety restrictions. Do not attempt.

primary.name: xtrackers_stoxx600_xlsx
primary.fields: col1=name, col2=ISIN, col3=country, col4=currency, col5=exchange, col9=sector, col10=weight
primary.ticker_resolution: yfinance.Lookup(isin).get_stock(count=8) filtered by COUNTRY_EXCHANGES dict; sleep 0.15s per lookup; ~97% hit rate
primary.notes: Direct GET, no auth. Returns ~49KB XLSX with 606 equity rows. Confirmed via bash test May 2026.

fallback.name: stoxx_com_html_scrape
fallback.fields: Company, Supersector, Country, Weight — NO ISINs or tickers
fallback.notes: Last resort only — no ISINs or tickers; requires unreliable name-to-ticker resolution. Log CONSTITUENT_SOURCE_FALLBACK=stoxx_html in RUN_QA if used.

dead_sources.name: stoxx_close_csv
dead_sources.notes: 404 on every attempt as of May 2026 run. Do not attempt.

dead_sources.name: ishares_stoxx600_csv
dead_sources.notes: Multiple iShares CSV endpoint patterns tried; all return 404 or WAF block. Product ID 251382 maps to wrong fund. Do not attempt.

dead_sources.name: wikipedia_stoxx600
dead_sources.notes: Wikipedia explicitly prohibited as a constituent source per Run_Context policy. Do not use under any circumstances.

_last_run_notes: F250-SPI run 2026-07-11 (forward-led LOCAL, constituent-hybrid): 449 constituents, 138 scored, 127 rankable, 19 SUMMARY eligible, 0 tech fails. Top total: TRN.L/TEMN.SW 46/50. Top Source Score: KLR.L 85 (100/100 fwd). Gate4 Industrials conc 45.7%. sync_repo_to_github.py aborted on unrelated broken scripts (build_vci_email.py, vci_acs_scorer.py) — GitHub mirror not refreshed this run. Local resume cache reset once mid-run after a tool timeout, forcing a full batch restart (deterministic re-score, no data loss). Excel in Investment Analysis folder.

runs.run_mode_note: Local bash VM unavailable (service not running). screener_local.py used on Composio in loop (screener_core.py timed out at 180s).

OneDrive not connected in Composio session. Excel in /mnt/files/isa_screener/.
VM service not running — forced Composio fallback for entire run.

runs.notes: First run with significant tech failure rate (27%). Composio 401 crumb cascade; add inter-batch sleep for future Composio loops. Email sent. Excel delivery pending OneDrive reconnection.

runs.constituent_source_note: Used as emergency fallback on this run; confirmed as primary source as of 2026-05-25 investigation

wikipedia_live_fetch.note: Wikipedia used as emergency fallback on this run only; prohibited per policy going forward

runs.run_mode_note: S5 forward-led, all 10 flags ON. SOURCE_WEIGHTS forward:0.60/revisions:0.15/deployability:0.10/quality:0.05/analyst:0.10
runs.notes: First S5 forward-led NASDAQ run. 888 constituents (+43 vs Jun-26 run), 435 scored (vs 229 in v27 — 90% pool expansion from gate relaxation). 0% tech fail rate. NVDA/DXCM 50/50 perfect total; APP 48/50 + 100/100 fwd axis. AUPH Igniting stage. Gate4 Technology concentration 40% (structural for Nasdaq).

runs.run_mode_note: Forward-led framework live (Jul-2026 go-live) — no manual flag flip needed.
runs.excel_file: Growth Stock Analysis F250 & SPI W-e 11-Jul-26.xlsx
runs.notes: Forward-led (live framework, no manual flag flip). 449 constituents, 138 scored, 127 rankable, 19 SUMMARY-eligible by Source Score, 0 tech fails. Top total TRN.L/TEMN.SW 46/50; top Source Score KLR.L 85 (100/100 fwd axis). Gate4 Industrials concentration 45.7% (up from 43.9% Jun-28). sync_repo_to_github.py aborted (unrelated VCI script syntax errors: build_vci_email.py, vci_acs_scorer.py) — GitHub fallback mirror not refreshed this run, but all F250-SPI-relevant scripts verified compiling and unaffected. Local resume cache reset once after a tool timeout (~batch 28/30), forcing a full batch restart — re-scored deterministically, no data loss, just extra calls. Composio /mnt/files/isa_env/.env missing again, recreated per protocol (third consecutive EU run to hit this).

runs.run_mode_note: Forward-led framework live (Jul-2026 go-live) — no manual flag flip needed. First MIDCAP400 run under floor-based SUMMARY.
runs.drawdown_state: -2.0% from 252d high, 0/3 tranches fired, regime RISK_ON
runs.notes: First MIDCAP400 run under live forward-led/floor-based SUMMARY (screen_source>=70, Part A floor 10, Part B floor 10). 214 scored (+2 vs 25-Jun), 174 rankable, 10 SUMMARY-eligible by Source Score vs 21 Strong Buys under old badge rule (methodology change, not a decline). 0 tech failures. NYT/MORN tied top total 48/50. Top Source Score SOLS/IESC 82 (100/100 fwd axis). Gate4 Consumer Cyclical concentration 25.3% (below 35% threshold; screener's internal flag trips lower, same known discrepancy as 25-Jun run). score_panel_logger and drawdown_monitor both ran clean; no DRAWDOWN_TRIGGER.

runs.run_mode_note: Forward-led framework live (Jul-2026 go-live) — no manual flag flip needed.
runs.notes: Clean run: 0 technical failures across 34 local score batches + 2 overlay batches. sync_repo_to_github.py: NOTHING_TO_SYNC. 503 constituents (within 490-515 band). 309 scored, 261 rankable, 10 SUMMARY-eligible by Source Score (floor-based, Fix Pack A1); top Source Score APP 93 (100/100 fwd axis, 48/50 total). NVDA/DXCM top total 50/50 and 49/50. Gate4 elimination breakdown: Technology 18 (19.4%), Industrials 18 (19.4%) — tied largest, below 35% single-sector threshold on Gate4 eliminations specifically. score_panel_logger store_total=552. drawdown_monitor: -1.9% from 252d high, 0/3 tranches, regime RISK_ON, no trigger.

runs.run_mode_note: Forward-led framework live (Jul-2026 go-live) — no manual flag flip needed.
runs.drawdown_state: -1.9% from 252d high (109.42), 0/3 tranches fired, regime RISK_ON
runs.notes: 863 constituents (post-$2bn filter), 100% accounted. 423 scored across 58 local score batches + 2 overlay batches, 0 technical failures. DXCM/NVDA top total 50/50. Top Source Score NVDA 89.6 (100/100 fwd axis). SUMMARY: 56 eligible pre-cap, 15 selected (floor 70, cap 40). Gate4 Technology concentration 37.8% (structural, consistent with prior Nasdaq runs ~40%). Bug found+fixed this run: fv_composite.py analyst_signal() crashed on NaN analyst_rating (float NaN is truthy, so 'rating or \"\"' didn't catch it) — fixed to isinstance-check, verified fix, pushed to GitHub via sync_repo_to_github.py. score_panel_logger store_total=975. drawdown_monitor: -1.9% from 252d high, 0/3 tranches, regime RISK_ON, no trigger.
